payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The command was not executed, and no memory cards were created or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user memory is implied by this administrative SQL command.

details: Received admin SQL request: SELECT * FROM memory_cards
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Enable SQL debugging in a safe administrative environment before retrying.
Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoint if available.
